title: Unexpected affinity conversion for view column in IN operator
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 VARCHAR, c3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, '1', 1.0);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE c1 > 0;
SELECT 1 IN (SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NULL);
key_bug_features: Unexpected affinity conversion in view column comparison
